display_name.en_min: English display name must be at least 2 characters
display_name.ar_min: Arabic display name must be at least 2 characters
display_name.en_max: English display name must not exceed 100 characters
display_name.ar_max: Arabic display name must not exceed 100 characters

description.en_min: English description must be at least 10 characters
description.ar_min: Arabic description must be at least 10 characters
description.en_max: English description must not exceed 500 characters
description.ar_max: Arabic description must not exceed 500 characters
